MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF DANIEL WEAVER'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement: DENIED without prejudice to renotice due to insufficient service. Plaintiff served the notice by fax only 21 days before the hearing. Under CCP 1005(b), 2 additional days must be added to the 21 day period if service is made by fax. Plaintiff should have served on 04/19/04 instead of 04/21/04. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
